title: Password Reset
content: Users can reset their password from Settings > Security > Reset Password. Click on 'Reset Password' and enter your registered email address. A password reset link will be sent to your email within 2-5 minutes. The reset link is valid for 24 hours. If you do not receive the email, check your spam folder or contact support. When creating a new password, ensure it meets the following requirements: minimum 8 characters, at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one number, and one special character. After resetting your password, all active sessions will be logged out for security purposes. You will need to log in again on all devices. If you have two-factor authentication enabled, you will also need your authentication code after entering the new password. Password reset attempts are limited to 5 per hour to prevent abuse. If you exceed this limit, your account will be temporarily locked for 30 minutes.

title: Billing and Payments
content: We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and PayPal for all subscription payments. Invoices are generated on the 1st of each month and sent to the billing email address on file. You can update your payment method from Settings > Billing > Payment Methods. To view your billing history, navigate to Settings > Billing > Invoices. All prices are listed in USD unless otherwise specified. Tax is calculated based on your billing address and applicable local regulations. If a payment fails, we will retry the charge up to 3 times over a period of 7 days. If all attempts fail, your account will be downgraded to the free tier. Refund requests must be submitted within 14 days of the charge. Refunds are processed within 5-10 business days and credited back to the original payment method. For annual subscriptions, a prorated refund is available if cancellation occurs within the first 30 days. Enterprise customers can request custom invoicing and payment terms by contacting their account manager.

title: Account Settings and Profile Management
content: To update your profile information, go to Settings > Profile. You can change your display name, profile picture, bio, and contact information. Email address changes require verification of the new email before the change takes effect. Your username can only be changed once every 90 days. To deactivate your account temporarily, go to Settings > Account > Deactivate. Deactivated accounts retain all data for 30 days. After 30 days, deactivated accounts are permanently deleted along with all associated data. To permanently delete your account, go to Settings > Account > Delete Account. This action is irreversible. All your data, including files, messages, and settings, will be permanently removed within 48 hours. You will receive a confirmation email before deletion begins. Notification preferences can be managed from Settings > Notifications. You can choose to receive notifications via email, push notification, or SMS. Quiet hours can be set to prevent notifications during specific time periods.

title: Two-Factor Authentication
content: Two-factor authentication (2FA) adds an extra layer of security to your account. To enable 2FA, go to Settings > Security > Two-Factor Authentication. We support three methods of 2FA: authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, or Microsoft Authenticator), SMS verification, and hardware security keys (YubiKey). The recommended method is using an authenticator app as it is the most secure and reliable option. When enabling 2FA, you will be given a set of 10 backup codes. Store these codes in a safe place as they can be used to access your account if you lose your authentication device. Each backup code can only be used once. If you lose access to your authentication device and backup codes, contact our support team with government-issued photo ID for identity verification. The recovery process takes 3-5 business days. 2FA is required for all administrator accounts and is strongly recommended for all users. Organizations on Enterprise plans can enforce 2FA for all team members through the admin dashboard.

title: Data Export and Privacy
content: You can export all your data at any time by going to Settings > Privacy > Export Data. The export includes your profile information, files, messages, settings, and activity logs. Data export is available in JSON and CSV formats. Large exports may take up to 24 hours to prepare, and you will receive an email notification when the download is ready. The download link remains active for 7 days. We comply with GDPR, CCPA, and other applicable data protection regulations. You have the right to access, modify, and delete your personal data. To submit a data access request, contact privacy@example.com or use the in-app request form under Settings > Privacy > Data Request. We do not sell or share your personal data with third parties for marketing purposes. Data is encrypted at rest using AES-256 encryption and in transit using TLS 1.3. Our data centers are located in the US, EU, and Asia-Pacific regions. You can choose your preferred data residency region from Settings > Privacy > Data Residency. Regular security audits are conducted by independent third-party firms.

title: Subscription Plans and Pricing
content: We offer four subscription tiers: Free, Starter, Professional, and Enterprise. The Free plan includes basic features with 1GB storage, up to 3 projects, and community support. The Starter plan costs $9.99 per month (or $99 per year) and includes 10GB storage, unlimited projects, email support, and basic analytics. The Professional plan costs $29.99 per month (or $299 per year) and includes 100GB storage, unlimited projects, priority support, advanced analytics, custom integrations, and API access. The Enterprise plan offers custom pricing and includes unlimited storage, dedicated account manager, SLA guarantees, SSO integration, audit logs, and custom deployment options. All paid plans come with a 14-day free trial. No credit card is required for the trial. You can upgrade, downgrade, or cancel your subscription at any time from Settings > Billing > Subscription. When upgrading, the price difference is prorated for the current billing cycle. When downgrading, the new rate takes effect at the next billing cycle. Team discounts are available for groups of 10 or more users.

title: Troubleshooting Login Issues
content: If you are unable to log in, try the following troubleshooting steps. First, ensure you are using the correct email address associated with your account. Passwords are case-sensitive, so check that Caps Lock is not enabled. Clear your browser cache and cookies, then try again. If you have forgotten your password, click 'Forgot Password' on the login page to initiate a password reset. If your account has been locked due to multiple failed login attempts, wait 30 minutes and try again, or contact support for immediate unlock. Check if your account has been deactivated or deleted. Deactivated accounts can be reactivated by logging in within 30 days. If you are using SSO (Single Sign-On), ensure your organization's identity provider is functioning correctly by contacting your IT administrator. For 2FA issues, use one of your backup codes to access your account. If you suspect your account has been compromised, contact support immediately at security@example.com. Our security team will investigate and help you regain access within 24 hours. Browser compatibility: we support the latest versions of Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge.

title: Contact Support and SLA
content: Our support team is available 24/7 for critical issues. You can reach us through multiple channels: in-app chat (recommended for fastest response), email at support@example.com, or phone at +1-800-555-0199 (available Mon-Fri, 9 AM - 6 PM EST). Response time SLAs vary by plan: Free plan users receive community support with no guaranteed response time. Starter plan users receive email support with a 24-hour response time. Professional plan users receive priority support with a 4-hour response time during business hours. Enterprise plan users receive dedicated support with a 1-hour response time 24/7 and a named account manager. For urgent issues such as service outages or security incidents, all users can use the emergency support line. Please have your account ID ready when contacting support. You can find your account ID in Settings > Account > Account Info. When submitting a support ticket, include a detailed description of the issue, steps to reproduce, screenshots if applicable, and your browser and OS information. Our average satisfaction rating is 4.8 out of 5 based on customer feedback surveys.
